mapper.select: SELECT sc.id, sc.dish_id, d.name AS dish_name, d.image_url AS dish_image_url, d.price AS dish_price, sc.quantity, d.price * sc.quantity AS amount FROM shopping_cart sc INNER JOIN dish d ON d.id = sc.dish_id WHERE sc.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY sc.update_time DESC, sc.id DESC
SELECT id, user_id, dish_id, quantity, create_time, update_time FROM shopping_cart WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND dish_id = #{dishId} LIMIT 1
